feedItems.description: allocated £151.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£457 per resident)
allocated £119.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£361 per resident)
allocated £52.8m to Roads & Transport (≈£159 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £126 (5.0%) to £2656
